{{CargoRelic
|name=Murikan Postcard
|class_id=20313
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Murika, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=19
|art=28
|fth=11
|civ=12
|tech=20
|ss1=Murikan Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Murikan Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Murikan Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Murikan Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Murikan Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
